searchDocs.content: </> PlayerRegistry:GetHandler(player: Player ) → PlayerHandler? Returns the PlayerHandler for the given player, if it exists.

searchDocs.title: CreateHandler​
searchDocs.content: </> PlayerRegistry:CreateHandler( player: Player , characterType: CharacterType ) → PlayerHandler? Creates a new PlayerHandler for the given player with the specified CharacterType. If a handler already exists for the player, it will be destroyed before creating a new one.

searchDocs.title: ProjectileModifier​
searchDocs.content: </> interface ProjectileModifier { Speed: number-- The speed to cast the projectile at Gravity: number-- The gravity to apply to the projectile Lifetime: number-- The lifetime of the projectile PVInstance: PVInstance? -- The instance to represent the projectile Color: Color3? -- The color to set the PVInstance to Timestamp: number?-- Server time when the projectile was cast OnImpact: BindableEvent? -- The event to fire on projectile impact }

searchDocs.title: Projectile​
searchDocs.content: </> interface Projectile { Position: Vector3 -- The current position of the projectile Velocity: Vector3 -- The current velocity of the projectile Acceleration: Vector3 -- The acceleration of the projectile RaycastParams: RaycastParams-- The raycast parameters for the projectile Lifetime: number-- The lifetime of the projectile StartTick: number-- The tick the projectile was cast LastTick: number-- The last tick the projectile was updated PVInstance: PVInstance? -- The instance representing the projectile Timestamp: number?-- Server time when the projectile was cast OnImpact: BindableEvent? -- The event to fire when the projectile impacts }

searchDocs.title: ActivatePrimary​
searchDocs.content: Override </> HammerController:ActivatePrimary(toActivate: boolean) → () Overrides ToolController:ActivatePrimary to delete the block the player is pointing at. If 'toActivate' is true, the hammer will continuously delete blocks until the method is called again with 'toActivate' set to false.

searchDocs.title: ActivateSecondary​
searchDocs.content: Override </> HammerController:ActivateSecondary(toActivate: boolean) → () Overrides ToolController:ActivateSecondary to place a block at the position the player is pointing at. If 'toActivate' is true, the hammer will continuously place blocks until the method is called again with 'toActivate' set to false.

searchDocs.content: </> interface Phase { Type: PhaseType Duration: number-- How long the phase lasts in seconds. TurfPerKill?: number-- The amount of turf gained per kill. Only applies to combat phases. } A phase of the round.

searchDocs.title: ActivatePrimary​
searchDocs.content: Override </> SlingshotController:ActivatePrimary(toActivate: boolean) → () Overrides ToolController:ActivatePrimary to fire a projectile. If toActivate is true, the slingshot will be drawn until the method is called again with toActivate set to false, at which point the projectile will be fired.
